name: Sour Cream Taco Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Grated Monterey Jack or mild cheddar cheese
400 g Bag of Tortilla Chips (Taco or Nacho)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together sour cream, taco seasoning, and chopped green onion in a large bowl.
2. Place the mixture into a shallow, wide serving dish.
3. Evenly top with grated cheese, salsa, lettuce, and tomato slices.
4. Serve with tortilla chips or nacho chips.
